name: drawing_exporter_read_sheets
desc: Read sheets from the Drawing Exporter. Returns sheet list and selected sheets. Supports filtering by revision, prefix, discipline, group, selection status, or export status.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional JSON filter object with keys: filter_by_revision, filter_by_prefix, filter_by_discipline, filter_by_group, filter_by_selected, filter_by_status.
